action_text: Type "Assigned to" into the report list search field
rationale: The current Global list search for “Incidents by” returns no results. Broadening to the key field name “Assigned to” is likely to surface the standard report (e.g., “Open Incidents by Assigned To”).

action_text: Type "Open Incidents by Assigned to" into the report list search field
rationale: Try the likely exact standard report title to quickly locate it if present in Global reports.

action_text: Type "Incidents by Assigned to" into the report list search field
rationale: Another plausible title variant that many instances use; this may match if the cataloged report omits “Open.”

action_text: Clear the report list search field
rationale: The current filter might be over-restrictive. Clearing it will restore the full Global list so we can try a different search or scan.

action_text: Switch to the Group tab of Reports
rationale: If the report isn’t Global, it might exist under Group scope. Switching tabs can reveal additional reports to search within.
